items.name: endpoint deletion
items.note: The source counts every distinct z satisfying the bad-parameter predicate; no endpoint-deletion map is part of that predicate. The Cycle116 radius is strictly below capacity.

items.name: periodic quotienting
items.note: Quotient-periodic classes occur in later analytic decompositions and conjectural upper bounds, not as an equivalence relation deleting raw bad parameters from def:mca.

items.name: quotient profile or quotient-core charge
items.note: The source has quotient mechanisms but no charge registry that subtracts them from the raw support-wise numerator.

items.name: tangent floor
items.note: The tangent floor is an additional lower bound on MCA error, not an exclusion or charge.

items.name: contained-line or contained-incidence exclusion
items.note: The source requires failure of simultaneous explanation on the same support; Cycle116 proves the direction word is not code-explainable on every designated witness support.

items.name: same-slope collision
items.note: The numerator is the distinct occupancy 52,747,567,092 after 12 double fibers, not the raw support count.

items.name: affine-color normalization
items.note: No affine-color event quotient appears in the attached MCA definitions.

items.name: retained-event map
items.note: The attached manuscripts define the event directly as a field element z; they do not define a later retained-event map.

items.name: AP_corr or exhaustive charge registry
items.note: No AP_corr predicate or exhaustive charge registry is present in the attached source files.

items.name: protocol challenge-field filtering
items.note: The manuscripts do not supply an authority-pinned protocol contract or q_chal rule.
